$schema: Manifest ↔ Prisma schema-drift allowlist. See scripts/manifest/audit-schema-drift.mjs for semantics.

_doc.globalAdapterDerived: Cross-cutting fields that EVERY Prisma store adapter injects from runtime context, not from command input. Applies to every governed entity.
_doc.adapterDerived: Per-entity fields that the entity's Prisma store adapter derives via a documented rule (e.g. looking up a parent entity).
_doc.nonconforming: Per constitution §14, acknowledged tech debt with an active removal plan. Bypass is not permission.
_doc.ignoredEntities: Entity names to skip entirely (e.g. infrastructure tables incorrectly tagged as governed).
_doc.ignoredFields: Per-entity field allowlist for fields the audit should not enforce.

tenantId.rule: Every Prisma store adapter injects tenantId from RuntimeContext.user.tenantId. See packages/manifest-adapters/src/prisma-store.ts where each .create() sets `tenantId: this.tenantId`. Constitution §19 requires runtime tenant context on every governed command.
